name: @symphony/agent-runtime
description: Symphony in-pod agent runtime — runs INSIDE the per-issue Docker pod that LocalDockerBackend starts. Reads /etc/symphony/dispatch.json, fetches the issue from Linear, clones the repo, renders the per-repo workflow.md, and drives the Claude Agent SDK. Streams AgentEvents back to the host daemon over a Unix socket bind-mounted at /var/run/symphony/events.sock. Per ADR 0011 + Plan 10. The build artifact (dist/entrypoint.js) is what the docker base image ENTRYPOINT executes.
